title: Pan Aroma Reed Diffuser, Apple & Cinnamon, 50Ml
features: WELCOMING HOME FRAGRANCE: Pan Aroma Reed Diffuser, gently diffuses a wonderful sweet & spicy Apple & Cinnamon fragrance creating a welcoming scent to any room in the home
CONTINUOUS SWEET & SPICY FRAGRANCE: Pan Aroma Reed Diffusers naturally diffuse fragrance in the home for up to 4 weeks
ADJUST FRAGRANCE STRENGTH: Unscrew the wooden collar, remove the plastic stopper, choose the number of reeds to suit personal fragrance for maximum fragrnace insert all supplied reeds
INSTANT FRAGRANCE BURST: An elegant & effective way to instantly add a burst of fragrance to any room, place in hallways, living areas and bathrooms
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Scent, Apple & Cinnamon. 4 Reed Stems, Volume 50ml
description: Product Description PAN AROMA is a market leading supplier of everything you need to make your home wonderfully fragranced. From tea lights, candles, reed diffusers, plug ins and home air fresheners, Pan Aroma has everything you need to add instant long lasting fragrance to any room in the home. The Pan Aroma Reed Diffuser, gently diffuses a wonderful sweet & spicy Apple & Cinnamon fragrance naturally in the home for up to 4 weeks. Elegant adn effective way to instantly add a burst of fragrance to any room, place in hallways, living areas and bathrooms. Apple & Cinnamon. 4 Reed Stems, Volume 50ml Directions To use the Pan Aroma Reed Diffuser, first unscrew the wooden collar and remove the plastic stopper. Then, choose the number of reeds to suit personal fragrance preference, with more reeds resulting in a stronger fragrance. Insert the reeds into the bottle, allowing the oil to travel up the reeds and disperse the fragrance into the room. The diffuser will gently diffuse the fragrance for up to 4 weeks. To instantly add a burst of fragrance, place the diffuser in hallways, living areas, and bathrooms. Safety Warning For safety, avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
